svg.text: input · output · validation — traced against orgnr 811722332 / 2024
① stage 1 · inputs (immutable, read-only on GCS)
wide build_tables row → long (orgnr, year, concept_id, value)
repeat × 15 tables → concat → 152 rows / 62 unique concepts
long observations + raw text → WADM annotations
2. scan each note's full_text for first match
3. emit text annotation (TextQuoteSelector) + pdf annotation (FragmentSelector page=N from [[p:N]])
4. miss → unmatched annotation (will end up in review_queue)
③ stage 3 · output (append-only event log on GCS)
one parquet file per (orgnr, year). idempotent: event_id = sha256(annotation_id|sequence) is the dedup key.
a single annotation across mutations · annotation_id = 2a11bef…b34f8a
▲ seq=0 is BIT-IDENTICAL after seq=1 was appended.
the original auto-extraction observation is never overwritten — naive empiricism preserved.
④ stage 4 · current state composed at query time
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY annotation_id ORDER BY sequence DESC) = 1
original view: WHERE sequence = 0 (auditable extraction baseline)
⑤ stage 5 · llm analyst loop (closes the unmatched gap)
for each unanchored annotation, the LLM receives the FULL source PDF + raw JSON + observation context
urn → GCS → PDF bytes (full doc inline to Gemini)
→ {action, exact, prefix, suffix, page, rationale, confidence}
⑥ validation · end-to-end against orgnr 811722332 / fiscal year 2024
